name: strategos-cli
description: Local-first orchestration for Claude Code, Codex CLI, and GitHub Copilot CLI.

scripts.web:check: cd web && vp check src vite.config.mjs package.json index.html
scripts.check: node --check ./bin/strategos.js && node --check ./scripts/install-hooks.js && node --check ./src/cli.js && node --check ./src/attachments.js && node --check ./src/capacity.js && node --check ./src/console.js && node --check ./src/terminal.js && node --check ./src/planner.js && node --check ./src/orchestrator.js && node --check ./src/session.js && node --check ./src/upgrade.js && node --check ./src/web-server.js
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm test && npm run web:check && npm run web:test && npm run web:build
